name: claude-project-memory
description: Project-scoped memory system for Claude Code. Unlike per-user memory tools, knowledge lives inside the repository — shared across the team, versioned in git, and stored as an Obsidian vault. Captures session decisions, errors, and discoveries in daily logs, then distills them via /claude-project-memory:memory-digest. The vault grows over time, making Claude's responses progressively more accurate for everyone on the team.

tools.name: uv
tools.description: Python package manager used to run the hook scripts
